_severity_note: All credential/token detectors are rated critical (immediate account compromise risk). High-entropy string detectors are rated warning (high false-positive rate, review manually). IPPublicDetector is rated info (low security impact on its own).

rules.check_description: Detects JFrog Artifactory API tokens and passwords. Exposure allows unauthorised access to your Artifactory artifact registry.
Detects AWS Access Key IDs (AKIA…) and AWS Secret Access Keys. Exposure can result in full AWS account compromise and significant financial damage.
Detects Azure Storage account keys. Exposure allows unauthorised read/write access to all data in the associated Azure Storage account.
Detects credentials embedded in URLs using HTTP Basic Authentication syntax (e.g. https://user:password@host). Hardcoded credentials can be extracted by end users.
Detects IBM Cloudant database credentials. Exposure allows unauthorised access to all data in the associated Cloudant database.
Detects Discord bot tokens. Exposure allows an attacker to take full control of the Discord bot, including reading all messages it can access.
Detects GitHub personal access tokens (ghp_, gho_, ghu_, ghs_, ghr_ prefixes). Exposure allows unauthorised access to GitHub repositories and account actions.
Detects GitLab personal access tokens and project tokens (glpat- prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised access to GitLab repositories and CI/CD pipelines.
Detects high-entropy Base64-encoded strings that may be secret keys, passwords, or tokens. Review each match manually to confirm whether it is a credential.
Detects high-entropy hexadecimal strings that may be secret keys, API keys, or cryptographic material. Review each match manually to confirm whether it is a credential.
Detects IBM Cloud IAM API keys. Exposure allows unauthorised access to IBM Cloud services associated with the account.

rules.check_name: IBM Cloud Object Storage HMAC credentials
rules.check_description: Detects IBM Cloud Object Storage HMAC credentials (access_key_id and secret_access_key pairs). Exposure allows unauthorised access to all data in the associated COS buckets.
Detects hardcoded public IP addresses. While not a credential, hardcoded IPs can expose internal infrastructure details and prevent configuration flexibility.
Detects JSON Web Tokens (eyJ… prefix). Hardcoded JWTs embedded in source code can be used by attackers to authenticate as the token's subject.
Detects assignments to variables with names suggesting secrets (password, passwd, secret, token, key, api_key, etc.). Review each match to confirm whether a real credential is hardcoded.
Detects Mailchimp API keys. Exposure allows unauthorised access to your Mailchimp account, including reading and modifying subscriber lists and sending campaigns.
Detects NPM authentication tokens (npm_… prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised publishing of packages to your npm account.
Detects OpenAI API keys (sk-… prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised use of your OpenAI account, leading to quota exhaustion and potential financial damage.
Detects PEM-encoded private keys (RSA, EC, DSA, OpenSSH, etc.) embedded in source code. Exposure allows an attacker to impersonate any identity associated with the key.
Detects PyPI upload tokens (pypi-… prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised publishing of packages to your PyPI account.
Detects SendGrid API keys (SG.… prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised sending of emails from your SendGrid account.
Detects Slack API tokens, webhooks, and bot tokens. Exposure allows reading Slack messages, posting as the bot, and accessing workspace data.
Detects SoftLayer (IBM Cloud Classic Infrastructure) API keys and usernames. Exposure allows unauthorised access to IBM Cloud Classic Infrastructure services.
Detects Square OAuth tokens and application secrets. Exposure allows unauthorised access to Square payment processing and merchant account data.
Detects Stripe API keys (sk_live_, sk_test_, rk_live_ prefixes). Exposure of a live key allows reading customer data and initiating unauthorised charges.
Detects Telegram bot API tokens. Exposure allows an attacker to take full control of the bot, read all messages, and impersonate it to users.
Detects Twilio API keys and Auth Tokens (SK… prefix). Exposure allows unauthorised sending of SMS/calls and reading of account communications.
